curation_notes: Patch modifies 2 non-test source files: src/lxml/iterparse.pxi (functions _countNsDefs and _appendStartNsEvents) and src/lxml/apihelpers.pxi (function _build_nsmap). All three functions iterate over namespace definitions (c_ns = c_node.nsDef) without checking for NULL c_ns.href before dereferencing. The fix adds explicit null checks (if c_ns.href:) and adjusts counting logic (count += (c_ns.href is not NULL)). Pre-assigned class null-deref from CWE-476 is correct — the vulnerability is a textbook NULL pointer dereference.
